channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Three yellow barriers left following road works, 6th May
item.description:
Three yellow barriers left near Penge east Station following previous road repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Please empty litter bins and remove rubished dumped in Harvington Park, 6th May
item.description:
Please empty litter bins and remove rubished dumped in Harvington Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, South Eden Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish in alleyway, 6th May
item.description:
Dumped last night, broken glass,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 6th May
item.description:
Finally the council remove the van that has sat in this spot for several months, only to leave behind the rubbish accumulated behind it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing button (park side) not working to call the lights to stop and allow people to cross, 6th May
item.description:
Pedestrian crossing at the junction of bean road and Danson road has a fault with the button. Pressing it doesn't call the lights to change meaning risky crossings for pedestrians from the park towards bean road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large item left outside my back gate, 6th May
item.description:
A large item that looks like a bean bag has been outside my back gate on Brunswick road for a few days now. It is near the corner of Dallin Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge, 6th May
item.description:
Mattress and old council salt box with Black sacks i side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Lumley Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London

item.title: Several potholes near road humps, 6th May
item.description:
